name: chrome-input-improve
description: Chrome extension that adds a floating optimize button to text inputs and uses an OpenAI-compatible API to improve the text.

scripts.dev: npm run build:dev && npm run watch
scripts.build:dev: npm run clean && npm run build:background:dev && npm run build:content:dev && npm run build:options:dev && npm run build:static
scripts.watch: npm run watch:background & npm run watch:content & npm run watch:options
scripts.build:release: npm run clean && npm run build:background:release && npm run build:content:release && npm run build:options:release && npm run build:static
scripts.build:static: mkdir -p dist && cp src/options/options.html dist/options.html && cp src/options/options.css dist/options.css
scripts.pack: npm run bump:version && npm run build:release && mkdir -p release && zip -r release/chrome-input-improve.zip manifest.json dist -x "**/.DS_Store"
